name: Internet Cost per GB
description: Global average cost of fixed-line internet per gigabyte of data. Tracks the dramatic decline in connectivity costs driven by fiber deployment, competition, and technology improvements.

data_points.source: ITU/TeleGeography — early broadband era, 512kbps DSL typical, ~$40/mo for limited data
ITU Measuring the Information Society 2009 — broadband spreading, higher caps
ITU/cable.co.uk historical data — ADSL2+ and early DOCSIS 3.0
ITU Measuring the Information Society 2012 — increasing data caps and speed tiers
ITU/OECD Communications Outlook — fiber and cable delivering hundreds of GB
ITU Measuring the Information Society 2016 — unlimited plans becoming common in developed markets
cable.co.uk Worldwide Broadband Price Research 2019 — global average declining
cable.co.uk Worldwide Broadband Price Research 2023 — effective cost per GB continues declining
cable.co.uk / ITU 2024 estimates — fiber expansion driving further declines globally
